bias_criteria.bullish: Price above 50D EMA, RSI on daily between 45 and 70, higher highs and higher lows on 4H
bias_criteria.bearish: Price below 50D EMA, RSI on daily below 45, lower highs and lower lows on 4H
bias_criteria.neutral: Price chopping around 50D EMA, RSI between 40 and 60, no clear structure
